mapper.sql: g.id, g.name, g.phone, g.avatar, g.store_id, g.qrcode_url, g.commission_rate, g.status, g.add_time, g.update_time, g.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , s.name as store_name FROM clothing_guide g LEFT JOIN clothing_store s ON g.store_id = s.id WHERE g.id = #{id} AND g.deleted = 0
SELECT FROM clothing_guide WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clothing_guide (name, phone, avatar, store_id, qrcode_url, commission_rate, status, deleted, add_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{storeId}, #{qrcodeUrl}, #{commissionRate}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE clothing_guide SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
